summary: Start the strategic terrain schema task after M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RECOVERY-001 closed in main. This task defines terrain-route-node authority, query, save/content hash, deterministic spatial semantics, and negative anti-grid/spatial-index tests.

decisions.decision: Start M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-SCHEMA-001 with systems_architect writer after recovery planning entered main and closed.
Open only the required systems_architect writer for this task; avoid extra research agents unless a blocker appears.

risks.summary: Schema/query/save boundaries determine whether the rejected map/spatial-index direction is truly replaced.
risks.mitigation: Require deterministic negative tests, QA review, and strict allowed-path enforcement.

requested_action: Systems writer should implement the schema/query/save-boundary package and return REVIEW handoff routed to qa_reviewer.
